title: lithospermum froebellii
intro: Lithospermum froebellii, also known as Fröbel's gromwell or Rocky Mountain gromwell, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lithospermum froebellii include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and skin irritations.
